entry.title: Like a House Afire
entry.summary:
Author: mynameisjessejk

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,167Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 76

Summary: This was not exactly what Bruce wanted when he suggested a Malone collaboration to prevent the Two-Facers from blowing up the entire leadership of the Irish Mob, but he probably should've expected it once Jason and Dick got involved. It is the perfect opportunity to introduce Steph to the Malones' world, though.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Afterglow
entry.summary:
Author: HawthorneWren

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,750Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: On the eve of a Wayne family wedding, the family celebrates love, friendship, and happily-ever-afters. While Tim and Damian prepare to begin their forever, old desires and old wounds resurface for Jason and Dick, forcing them to reexamine a love story they thought had ended years ago.

entry.title: bottoms up (let's forget tonight)
entry.summary:
Author: 002yb

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,503Chapters: 13/14Kudos: 610

Summary: Life has a funny way of screwing people and Jason has always looked best fucked over. It’s why it isn’t all that surprising that he wakes up from a blackout stupor to the staggering realization that he’s slept with his not-quite-brother and crush-for-forever. He expects it to be a big deal. It's not.

entry.title: Decadent Elegy on the Rusted Edge
entry.summary:
Author: Lucerne3149D

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,328Chapters: 4/10Kudos: 49

Summary: Dick Grayson once believed that hard work alone could change his fate. By day, he is a top student in the criminal justice program at community college; by night, he wipes down the bar at a rundown tavern on the edge of the city just to survive. Heavy debt is slowly grinding away his pride.Until Jason Todd appears.The cold, arrogant, and wildly wealthy heir uses two thousand dollars to buy one night with him. That night, money and desire collide in raw, naked heat.From cold transactions to fierce confrontations, then to gradually uncontrollable possession and redemption — the two become entangled again and again on the edge.They both thought they could control the game, but they never expected that a decadent elegy of class, desire, and downfall had already begun to play.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Domination
entry.summary:
Author: Mariessa

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,125Chapters: 18/25Kudos: 116

Summary: Dick struggles to keep his family together. Too bad life had other plans and he's meeting his maker. --- "I apologize." Dick's voice was far, far away. "I do love you, Jason. I love you like everyone else." "Well, I didn't." --- NOTE 2026: I am actively editing this so every once in a while you may see the word count change. I have cleaned up the tags also so its not as confusing for new readers and will update every few months.

entry.title: How to bond with bats
entry.summary:
Author: Bunnyreader7397

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,472Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 115

Summary: Funny random one-offs of day-to-day life in the Bat family household. When the house can’t hold anymore, the chaos floods into Gotham from time to time.Basically, a place to just throw a bunch of silly little things for my head-canons. Request accepted.I don't currently have a beta, so I apologize if some grammar is fucked up. If you'd be interested in partnering, let me know.

entry.title: Remember to remember me
entry.summary:
Author: LaundryBasket (LaundryBasket____LuLuGal)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,156Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 574

Summary: It starts with Dick forgetting his keys. It’s something Jason easily brushes aside, even when Dick forgets to get groceries and of all things his shoes one day it’s something they can chalk up to stress or lack of sleep. What really gets Jason concerned (not worried) is when Dick casually calls, asking for their apartment number after wandering the street for over an hour. Since the apartment incident Jason’s been paying a lot closer attention. Maybe too close as Dick has commented on. Jason finally decided he’s overreacting…until the night he’s woken up from the sound of glass breaking. OR Dick is beginning to have issues with his memory, Jason is there through it all and they realize their relationship goes deeper than either of them thought, memory or not.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: [DickJay] Stalker
entry.summary:
Author: Luv_ya

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,972Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 41

Summary: A person who had died and come back to life like Jason should have been immune to fear. He had challenged cosmic entities, walked through the bloodiest nightmares of Gotham without batting an eye. But Jason Todd was also a normal human being, nothing more and nothing less, who still knew what fear and terror were
